name: openEuler Intelligence
description: Build AI-powered apps with openEuler Intelligence. Supports RAG knowledge Q&A, workflow orchestration, Agent apps, and MCP services for developers and enterprises.

name: openEuler Intelligence: AI Agent & LLM Platform | openEuler
description: Build AI-powered apps with openEuler Intelligence. Supports RAG knowledge Q&A, workflow orchestration, Agent apps, and MCP services for developers and enterprises.

name: openEuler Intelligence Features
description: Key features of the openEuler Intelligence LLM platform

itemListElement.name: RAG-based knowledge Q&A
itemListElement.description: The knowledge base module supports parsing mainstream document formats such as PDF, DOCX, and PPTX. Enterprises and individual developers can build personalized intelligent Q&A assistants in just one day by leveraging the knowledge base, local documents, built-in knowledge bases, and LLMs.

itemListElement.name: Workflow applications
itemListElement.description: Enterprises and individuals can upload local API definitions through OpenAPI, then visually orchestrate workflows to create applications that intelligently and precisely schedule API capabilities, reducing secondary development costs.

itemListElement.name: Agent applications
itemListElement.description: Enterprises and individuals can register local MCP services and easily organize them to build Agent applications that enable intelligent orchestration and scheduling of MCP services to accomplish complex tasks in production environments.

itemListElement.name: Intelligent Tuning
itemListElement.description: Unlock 10%+ performance gains with the native tuning agent for intelligent system optimization.
